item.ptxt: Perform cruise control system check referring to Cruise Control System Check before performing this “Cruise Control System Symptom Diagnosis”.
Check each part in the order from the top of the following list.

condition.ptxt: “CRUISE” or “SET” indicator light does not turn on or off

action.ptxt: Check DTC referring to DTC Check .
Check MAIN (ON/OFF) switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Check SET/COAST switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Check RES/ACC switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection
Check CANCEL switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection
Check CPP No.2 switch for function referring to CPP No.2 Switch Inspection (M/T Model)
Check brake light switch for function referring to Brake Light Switch Inspection .
Repair.
Check combination meter function referring to Inspection of Combination Meter and Its Circuit .
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.
Check MAIN (ON/OFF) switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Check SET/COAST switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Check brake light switch for function referring to Brake Light Switch Inspection .
Check CPP No.2 switch for function referring to CPP No.2 Switch Inspection (M/T Model) .
Repair.
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.

condition.ptxt: Acceleration or deceleration is not available by operating RES/ACC or SET/COAST switch

action.ptxt: Check RES/ACC or SET/COAST switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Repair.
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.
Check CANCEL switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Check brake light switch for function referring to Brake Light Switch Inspection .
Check CPP No.2 switch for function referring to CPP No.2 Switch Inspection (M/T Model) .
Repair.
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.

condition.ptxt: Cruise control at vehicle speed stored in memory cannot be resumed after cruise control was canceled by means other than MAIN (ON/OFF) switch

action.ptxt: Check RES/ACC switch for function referring to Cruise Control Switch Inspection .
Repair.
Replace after making sure that none of above parts is faulty.
